mapper.select:
select v.activityalias_ , v.businessstate_ , t1.id , t1.secret_level , t1.project_id , t1.project_name , t1.task_id , t1.task_name , t1.ys_date , t1.pf_file_name , t1.pf_date , t1.pf_no , t1.comp_dept , t1.comp_user , t1.ys_idea , t1.created_by , t1.creation_date , t1.last_updated_by , t1.last_update_date , t1.last_update_ip , t1.version , t1.created_dept , t1.org_identity , t1.attribute_01 , t1.attribute_02 , t1.attribute_03 , t1.attribute_04 , t1.attribute_05 , t1.attribute_06 , t1.attribute_07 , t1.attribute_08 , t1.attribute_09 , t1.attribute_10 from pm_project_ys_da t1 left join bpm_client_hist_procinst_v v on t1.id = v.formid_
and t1.ID =#{bean.id}
and t1.SECRET_LEVEL like concat(concat('%',#{bean.secretLevel}),'%')
and t1.PROJECT_ID like concat(concat('%',#{bean.projectId}),'%')
and t1.PROJECT_NAME like concat(concat('%',#{bean.projectName}),'%')
and t1.TASK_ID like concat(concat('%',#{bean.taskId}),'%')
and t1.TASK_NAME like concat(concat('%',#{bean.taskName}),'%')
and t1.YS_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.ysDate}),'%')
and t1.PF_FILE_NAME like concat(concat('%',#{bean.pfFileName}),'%')
and t1.PF_DATE >= #{bean.pfDateBegin}
and t1.PF_DATE <= #{bean.pfDateEnd}
and t1.PF_NO like concat(concat('%',#{bean.pfNo}),'%')
and t1.COMP_DEPT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.compDept}),'%')
and t1.COMP_USER like concat(concat('%',#{bean.compUser}),'%')
and t1.YS_IDEA like concat(concat('%',#{bean.ysIdea}),'%')
and t1.CREATED_BY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.createdBy}),'%')
and t1.CREATION_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.creationDate}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdatedBy}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdateDate}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdateIp}),'%')
and t1.VERSION like concat(concat('%',#{bean.version}),'%')
and t1.CREATED_DEPT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.createdDept}),'%')
and t1.ORG_IDENTITY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.orgIdentity}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_01 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute01}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_02 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute02}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_03 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute03}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_04 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute04}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_05 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute05}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_06 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute06}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_07 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute07}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_08 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute08}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_09 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute09}),'%')
and t1.ATTRIBUTE_10 like concat(concat('%',#{bean.attribute10}),'%')
and exists (select 1 from BPM_CLIENT_HIST_TASK_V os where os.task_b_id_ = t1.id and os.assignee_ = #{bean.currUserId})
and v.businessstate_ = #{bean.bpmState}
and ${sfnConditions.sql}
and t1.ORG_IDENTITY =#{org}
order by t1.creation_date desc

select t1.id , t1.secret_level , t1.project_id , t1.project_name , t1.task_id , t1.task_name , t1.ys_date , t1.pf_file_name , t1.pf_date , t1.pf_no , t1.comp_dept , t1.comp_user , t1.ys_idea , t1.created_by , t1.creation_date , t1.last_updated_by , t1.last_update_date , t1.last_update_ip , t1.version , t1.created_dept , t1.org_identity , t1.attribute_01 , t1.attribute_02 , t1.attribute_03 , t1.attribute_04 , t1.attribute_05 , t1.attribute_06 , t1.attribute_07 , t1.attribute_08 , t1.attribute_09 , t1.attribute_10 from pm_project_ys_da t1 where t1.id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into pm_project_ys_da
id,
secret_level,
project_id,
project_name,
task_id,
task_name,
ys_date,
pf_file_name,
pf_date,
pf_no,
comp_dept,
comp_user,
ys_idea,
created_by,
creation_date,
last_updated_by,
last_update_date,
last_update_ip,
version,
created_dept,
org_identity,
attribute_01,
attribute_02,
attribute_03,
attribute_04,
attribute_05,
attribute_06,
attribute_07,
attribute_08,
attribute_09,
attribute_10,
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{secretLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{ysDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{pfFileName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{pfDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{pfNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{compDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{compUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{ysIdea,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{creationDate},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute06,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute07,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{attribute08,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{attribute09,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{attribute10,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

insert into pm_project_ys_da( id, secret_level, project_id, project_name, task_id, task_name, ys_date, pf_file_name, pf_date, pf_no, comp_dept, comp_user, ys_idea, created_by, creation_date, last_updated_by, last_update_date, last_update_ip, version, created_dept, org_identity, attribute_01, attribute_02, attribute_03, attribute_04, attribute_05, attribute_06, attribute_07, attribute_08, attribute_09, attribute_10)
select #{item.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.secretLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.ysDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.pfFileName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.pfDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.pfNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.compDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.compUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.ysIdea,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.creationDate}, #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.lastUpdateDate}, #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.version,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute06,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attribute07,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.attribute08,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.attribute09,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.attribute10,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} from dual
mapper.update:
update pm_project_ys_da
id =#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
secret_level =#{secretLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
project_id =#{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
project_name =#{projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
task_id =#{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
task_name =#{taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ys_date =#{ysDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pf_file_name =#{pfFileName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pf_date =#{pfDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
pf_no =#{pfNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
comp_dept =#{compDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
comp_user =#{compUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ys_idea =#{ysIdea,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_by =#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
creation_date =#{creationDate},
last_updated_by =#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
last_update_date =#{lastUpdateDate},
last_update_ip =#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version =version+1,
created_dept =#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
org_identity =#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_01 =#{attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_02 =#{attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_03 =#{attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_04 =#{attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_05 =#{attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_06 =#{attribute06,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attribute_07 =#{attribute07,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
attribute_08 =#{attribute08,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
attribute_09 =#{attribute09,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
attribute_10 =#{attribute10,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id} and version =#{version}

update pm_project_ys_da set id =#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, secret_level =#{secretLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_id =#{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_name =#{projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, task_id =#{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, task_name =#{taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ys_date =#{ysDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pf_file_name =#{pfFileName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pf_date =#{pfDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, pf_no =#{pfNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, comp_dept =#{compDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, comp_user =#{compUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ys_idea =#{ysIdea,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_by =#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, creation_date =#{creationDate}, last_updated_by =#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_update_date =#{lastUpdateDate}, last_update_ip =#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version =version+1, created_dept =#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, org_identity =#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_01 =#{attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_02 =#{attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_03 =#{attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_04 =#{attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_05 =#{attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_06 =#{attribute06,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_07 =#{attribute07,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute_08 =#{attribute08,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute_09 =#{attribute09,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, attribute_10 =#{attribute10,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id} and version =#{version}

update.foreach: update pm_project_ys_da set id =#{item.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, secret_level =#{item.secretLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_id =#{item.projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, project_name =#{item.projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, task_id =#{item.taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, task_name =#{item.taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ys_date =#{item.ysDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pf_file_name =#{item.pfFileName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pf_date =#{item.pfDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, pf_no =#{item.pfNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, comp_dept =#{item.compDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, comp_user =#{item.compUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ys_idea =#{item.ysIdea,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_by =#{item.createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, creation_date =#{item.creationDate}, last_updated_by =#{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_update_date =#{item.lastUpdateDate}, last_update_ip =#{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version =version+1, created_dept =#{item.createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, org_identity =#{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_01 =#{item.attribute01,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_02 =#{item.attribute02,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_03 =#{item.attribute03,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_04 =#{item.attribute04,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_05 =#{item.attribute05,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_06 =#{item.attribute06,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute_07 =#{item.attribute07,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute_08 =#{item.attribute08,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute_09 =#{item.attribute09,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, attribute_10 =#{item.attribute10,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{item.id} and version =#{item.version};
